reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The employee who served us was very rude and grumpy. Worst empanada I've ever eaten in my life. Avoid this place. Clean bathrooms. Good for getting gas and using the restroom.

(Original)
Funcionária que nos atendeu muito mal educada e mal humorada. Pior empanada que já comi na vida. Fuja desse lugar. Banheiros limpos. Serve para abastecer e usar banheiro
